title: Tower BBQ Multi-Functional Spatula/ Tongs with Wooden Handle, Stainless Steel
features: 2-IN-1 SPATULA: This multi-functional BBQ accessory allows you to use as a spatula or tongs for turning and serving delicious meats and veggies
HIGH QUALITY STAINLESS STEEL: Crafted from durable, high quality stainless steel for reliability and long-lasting use
STAY COOL OAK WOOD HANDLE: Its stylish yet practical oak wood handle stays cool to provide a comfortable grip and added safety when cooking
STRONG & DURABLE: Its strong and durable design means you can easily grip, turn and flip fillets of steak, juicy burgers and crispy skewers to ensure they’re cooked thoroughly
EASY TO CLEAN: Hand wash is recommended to keep your multi-functional spatula at its best, maintaining the premium stainless steel finish
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year guarantee and a 2 year extension, subject to product registration online

A BRAND YOU CAN TRUST: Tower is an iconic British brand boasting over 100 years of quality in manufacturing and design excellence. Tower is the UK’s fastest growing SDA & Housewares brand loved by millions of households
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Tower T932021 Outdoor Living Multi-Functional Spatula with Wooden Handle, Stainless Steel Ultimate 2-in-1 BBQ accessory for turning and serving delicious meats and veggies Flip fillets of steak, juicy burgers and crispy skewers using this Multi-Function Spatula from Tower. This 2-in-1 BBQ accessory functions a spatula or tongs for turning and serving all your favourites. Its stylish yet practical oak wood handle stays cool to provide a comfortable grip and added safety when cooking. Crafted from durable, high quality stainless steel for reliability, hand wash is recommended to keep your multi-functional spatula at its best.
